title: NA-Non ULIP
word_text:
Smart Ideas to Improve Your Insurance Protection Amid Heightened Uncertainties
Keywords: life insurance policy, types of life insurance, buy life insurance, best life insurance policy, buy life insurance online
Meta Description: Pandemic-related risks have made health and life insurance policies mandatory for all. Read on to find out how you can enhance the protective umbrella of such plans.
A life insurance policy helps financially secure your future from unexpected emergencies. The ongoing pandemic has caused the risks and uncertainties of our lives to cross their usual thresholds. Given the risky nature of the present situation, the significance of such safety nets has increased by leaps and bounds.
While buying a life insurance policy doesn’t shield you and your loved ones from illness, it can surely help you bear the growing costs related to such conditions. The best insurance policies offer comprehensive coverage that helps mitigate the financial stress and strain related to such heightened uncertainties.
If you’re wondering how you can enhance the protective cover of your life insurance plan, fret not, for we’ve got you covered. Here’s how you can improve your insurance protection amid such heightened uncertainties.
Choose an individual or family floater health plan as per your requirements
A family floater health insurance plan may be a good option to consider, given the pressing need to cover healthcare expenses related to the pandemic. With such all-in-one plans, you can ensure that the healthcare expenses of both you and your dependent family members are sufficiently covered. Moreover, given the highly infectious nature of the Covid-19 virus, when one member of your family tests positive, chances are others will soon test positive too. Thus, you must ensure that you opt for an adequate health cover when picking a floater plan.
Alternatively, if you are a senior citizen or someone without dependents, an individual health plan may be more suited for you. You can sift through both individual and family floater health plans online to pick one that best suits your coverage requirements.
Favour an independent health policy along with your employer-provided policy
Most people believe that they need not purchase an independent health insurance plan if their employer already provides them with one. However, this is a myth that needs to be busted. The group policy benefits of such employer-provided policies end as soon as you decide to move on from the organisation. If you decide to purchase a new health plan now, you’ll have to endure fresh waiting periods for your pre-existing conditions as well as other restrictions.
Additionally, the pandemic has left thousands of people unemployed. This means that they’ve lost both their source of income and healthcare covers. To avoid such precarious situations, especially during such uncertain times, opting for an independent healthcare policy may be a good choice. Since employers are more concerned about meeting the basic healthcare insurance thresholds, they may often pick plans that come with inadequate covers. Thus, if you simply rely on your employer-provided plan, you may have to face coverage restrictions, room-rent caps and several other restrictions when in need of medical assistance.
Consider purchasing a super top-up plan to improve coverage
The base cover of your health and life insurance policies may not be able to manage the heightened risks of the pandemic. In such cases, opting for a super top-up plan may be prudent as such plans help enhance the coverage umbrella of your policy. With a super top-up plan in place, you can file multiple hospitalisation claims, even after you’ve exhausted your basic health cover.
For instance, if you have a base cover of ₹ 6 lakhs and opt for an additional ₹ 20 lakh super top-up cover (with ₹ 5 lakh deductible), medical expenses up to ₹ 20 lakhs will be covered by your super top-up plan. Thus, such plans enhance your safety net while keeping premiums low and manageable.
Take stock of your existing life insurance policies
The pandemic has not just heightened the risks of medical emergencies but also the possibility of one’s untimely demise. In such a situation, while you need to look into your health cover, you also need to plan for the future financial well-being of your family. To ensure that your family is financially secured, you need to re-evaluate your existing life insurance policies.
With time, your income may have changed. There may have been major life changes like marriage or the birth of your children. All this may have changed your life goals. This coupled with the heightened pandemic-related risks, will surely have an impact on your insurance needs. Thus, after assessment, if you feel that your current plan doesn’t offer adequate benefits, you can opt for a new policy that comes with better coverage that can meet your set life goals. Whether you wish to save for your children’s education or build up your retirement fund, you can find and buy life insurance plans online as per your requirements. Simply sift through the various types of life insurance plans available on the market to find one that best suits your insurance needs.
Summing Up
While safeguarding yourself from all the uncertainties of the modern world may not be possible, it is certainly possible to take necessary precautions against them. You start by investing in a health and life insurance plan. If you already have a health cover in place, buying a life insurance policy may be the next most prudent choice. Once you’ve built this comprehensive safety net, simply implement the tips listed above to optimise your protective shield against the heightened life and health risks of today.
